plan_metadata.name: DA Microsoft Entra js Local Debug

steps.description: Click the "Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot" option in the dropdown menu under the "New Project" dialog.
Click on the "Add an Action" dropdown option under the "Add an action to your declarative agent" menu in the "Create Declarative Agent" modal in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Click the "Start with a New API" option from the dropdown under the "Create an Action" modal in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Microsoft" option in the dropdown menu under the "Authentication Type" field.
Click on the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu located at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog box to select the location for the project.
